note: Guide us to the straight path
Accept from us (Ibrahim building Ka'bah)
Make us Muslims and show us rites
Good in this world and hereafter
Pour upon us patience (Talut's army)
Do not burden us beyond capacity
Do not let our hearts deviate
You will gather mankind
We have believed, forgive us our sins
O Allah, Owner of Sovereignty
You cause the night to enter the day
Grant me good offspring (Zakariya)
We believed in what You revealed
Forgive us our sins and excess
You did not create this aimlessly
Whoever You admit to Fire, disgraced
We heard a caller calling to faith
Grant us what You promised
We have believed, write us among witnesses
Send down a table spread (Isa)
We have wronged ourselves (Adam & Hawa)
Do not place us with wrongdoing people
Decide between us and our people (Shu'ayb)
Pour upon us patience and let us die as Muslims
If You had willed, You could have destroyed us (Musa)
Ordain for us good in this world and hereafter
Do not make us a trial for wrongdoing people
Save us by Your mercy
I seek refuge in asking what I have no knowledge of (Nuh)
Cause me to die as a Muslim (Yusuf)
Make this city secure (Ibrahim)
You know what we conceal and declare
Make me an establisher of prayer (Ibrahim)
Forgive me and my parents (Ibrahim)
Have mercy on my parents as they raised me
Cause me to enter a sound entrance
Grant us mercy from Yourself (People of the Cave)
Expand for me my breast (Musa)
Increase me in knowledge
Adversity has touched me (Ayyub)
No deity except You, exalted are You (Yunus)
Do not leave me alone without heir (Zakariya)
Let me land at a blessed landing place (Nuh)
I seek refuge in You from incitements of devils
We have believed, forgive and have mercy
Forgive and have mercy, You are best of merciful
Avert from us punishment of Hell
Grant us comfort in spouses and offspring
Grant me authority and join me with righteous (Ibrahim)
Enable me to be grateful for Your favor (Sulayman)
I have wronged myself, forgive me (Musa)
Save me from the wrongdoing people (Musa)
Perhaps my Lord will guide me (Musa)
I am in need of whatever good You send (Musa)
Support me against corrupting people (Lut)
Praise to Allah who removed sorrow (in Paradise)
Grant me righteous offspring (Ibrahim)
You encompass all things in mercy and knowledge (angels)
Admit them to gardens of Eden (angels)
Protect them from evil deeds (angels)
Remove the torment, indeed we are believers
Enable me to be grateful and do righteousness
I am overpowered, so help (Nuh)
Forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith
Upon You we have relied (Ibrahim)
Do not make us a trial for disbelievers
Perfect for us our light and forgive us
Build for me a house in Paradise (wife of Pharaoh)
Do not leave any disbeliever on earth (Nuh)
Forgive me and my parents (Nuh)
Seeking refuge in Lord of daybreak
Seeking refuge in Lord of mankind
Make this a secure city (Ibrahim)
Send among them a messenger (Ibrahim)
We hear and we obey, Your forgiveness our Lord
I have dedicated what is in my womb (mother of Maryam)
I have named her Maryam and seek refuge
My bones have weakened (Zakariya)
We fear he will hasten punishment (Musa & Harun)
Support me against the denying people (Nuh)
If You show me what they are promised
Save me and my family (Lut)
Forgive me and grant me a kingdom (Sulayman)
We were wrongdoers (people of the garden)
Sufficient for us is Allah, best Disposer of affairs
